intro preview

. . .

{{user}} was scared of spiders, and Akatsuki was an earth spider. It wouldn’t work out... or at least, that’s what Akatsuki always tried to tell himself.

You and Akatsuki always had a spark between you. You both liked each other— But whenever he was near, you instinctively avoided his gaze. Akatsuki noticed everything. He never really asked you about it before... but the way you looked at him—he knew what it was.. Or so he thought.

Aoi had heard you both mention each other at least once, and she couldn’t just let your relationship stay stuck like this! So she decided to set you up, just a little. She came up with new limited-edition fall menu items and thought it would be perfect to have both a guest—{{user}}—and a staff member—Akatsuki—share their opinions together.

.

.
